report_title: Competitive Intelligence Report on OpenAI's ChatGPT and New Features

official_insights.title: OpenAI Announces Strategic Partnership with Amazon
official_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI has announced a strategic partnership with Amazon, involving an initial $15 billion investment from Amazon in OpenAI. This collaboration aims to accelerate AI innovation for enterprises and end consumers globally. The partnership includes the development of a Stateful Runtime Environment powered by OpenAI's models, which will be available through Amazon Bedrock.

official_insights.title: ChatGPT Gains Momentum with Over 50 Million Subscribers
official_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI reports that ChatGPT has over 900 million weekly active users and more than 50 million consumer subscribers. The platform is being used for various purposes such as learning, writing, planning, and building. As usage scales, the product improves with faster responses, higher reliability, stronger safety, and better performance.

official_insights.title: Introducing Stateful Runtime Environment in Amazon Bedrock
official_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI is introducing a Stateful Runtime Environment for agents that will run inside the AWS environment. This runtime environment optimizes models to work with AWS services, providing context and memory/history to agents. It simplifies multi-step workflows and enables solutions like customer support, sales operations, IT automation, and finance processes.

trusted_insights.title: OpenAI and Amazon Partnership Details
trusted_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI and Amazon have announced a multi-year strategic partnership with an initial $15 billion investment from Amazon. The partnership aims to bring advanced AI capabilities to enterprises worldwide, including the development of a Stateful Runtime Environment for agents in Amazon Bedrock.

trusted_insights.title: ChatGPT's User Base and Product Improvements
trusted_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI reports that more than 9 million paying business users rely on ChatGPT for work. The platform is being used by startups, enterprises, and governments to transform their products and services. Weekly Codex users have tripled since the start of the year, with over 1.6 million users now creating, automating, and shipping software.

trusted_insights.title: Stateful Runtime Environment in Amazon Bedrock
trusted_insights.brief_summary: The Stateful Runtime Environment is designed to simplify multi-step workflows by providing agents with working context, memory/history, tool and workflow state, environment use, and identity/permission boundaries. It runs natively in Amazon Bedrock and is optimized for AWS infrastructure.

references.title: Scaling AI for everyone - OpenAI
references.snippet:
ChatGPT is where people start with AI, with more than 900M weekly active users, and we now have more than 50 million consumer subscribers.. Subscriber momentum accelerated meaningfully to start the year, with January and February on track to be the largest months for new subscribers in our history. People use ChatGPT to learn, write, plan, and build. As usage scales, the product improves in ways people feel immediately: faster responses, higher reliability, stronger safety, and more consistent performance. [...] You can see that scale in our products. Codex brings the power of a top engineer to anyone who wants to build software. Weekly Codex users have more than tripled since the start of the year to 1.6M. More people are now creating, automating, and shipping software that once required a full engineering team.

More than 9 million paying business users rely on ChatGPT for work, and startups, enterprises, and governments are building on the OpenAI platform to transform how their products and services are designed, delivered, and run. Teams start with individual productivity and move quickly to deployment across engineering, support, finance, sales, and operations. Our Frontier platform helps enterprises build, deploy, and manage AI coworkers. [...] Image 3: Amazon > Card

Table of contents

   Understanding single-minus amplitudes in gravity
   Methodology and verification
   What’s next

March 4, 2026

ResearchPublication

Extending single-minus amplitudes to gravitons

Researchers used GPT‑5.2 Pro to help find a new mathematical result describing how particles can interact in quantum gravity.

Read the preprint(opens in a new window)

Loading…

Share [...] The derivation combines several established tools in amplitude theory, including recursion relations that iteratively construct many-particle interactions from smaller building blocks and symmetry constraints that restrict the allowed form of the result. The final formulas were verified analytically and checked for consistency with known physical limits. After further interaction with GPT‑5.2 Pro, the amplitudes were also found to be consistent with an infinite-dimensional symmetry first studied in connection with gravity by Roger Penrose.

Sora
   Sora Overview
   Features
   Pricing
   Sora log in(opens in a new window) [...] Today, we’re making this easier for customers through a partnership and joint collaboration with Amazon to deliver the new Stateful Runtime Environment that runs natively in Amazon Bedrock.AWS customers will have access to the Runtime Environment, powered by OpenAI models, optimized for AWS infrastructure and tailored for agentic workflows, with the state, reliability, and governance needed for production work.

##### Simplify getting agents into production [...] The Stateful Runtime Environment is jointly designed to reduce that load. It runs inside your AWS environment and is optimized to work with AWS services. Now, instead of manually stitching together disconnected requests to make things work, your agents automatically execute complex steps with “working context” that carries forward memory/history, tool and workflow state, environment use, and identity/permission boundaries.

##### What this unlocks

It’s now easier than ever to deliver solutions like multi-system customer support, sales operations workflows, internal IT automation, and finance processes with approvals and audits.

##### Faster time to production for multi-step workflows

Safety
   Safety Approach

   Trust & Transparency [...] Stateful developer environments are the next generation of how frontier models will be used, seamlessly enabling models to access elements like compute, memory, and identity. A Stateful Runtime Environment allows developers to keep context, remember prior work, work across software tools and data sources, and access compute. They're designed to handle ongoing projects and workflows.

These stateful developer environments will be trained to run optimally on AWS's infrastructure and integrated with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore and infrastructure services so customers’ AI applications and agents run cohesively with the rest of their infrastructure applications running in AWS. The Stateful Runtime Environment is expected to launch in the next few months.
